tools.name: services.createMessageInteraction
tools.description: Create a new message Interaction to send directly from your system to one [Participant](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/participant).  The `inbound` properties for the Interaction will always be empty.

tools.name: services.createParticipant
tools.description: Add a new Participant to the Session

tools.name: services.createPhoneNumber
tools.description: Add a Phone Number to a Service's Proxy Number Pool.

tools.name: services.createService
tools.description: Create a new Service for Twilio Proxy

tools.name: services.createSession
tools.description: Create a new Session

tools.name: services.createShortCode
tools.description: Add a Short Code to the Proxy Number Pool for the Service.

tools.name: services.deleteInteraction
tools.description: Delete a specific Interaction.

tools.name: services.deleteParticipant
tools.description: Delete a specific Participant. This is a soft-delete. The participant remains associated with the session and cannot be re-added. Participants are only permanently deleted when the [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) is deleted.

tools.name: services.deletePhoneNumber
tools.description: Delete a specific Phone Number from a Service.

tools.name: services.deleteService
tools.description: Delete a specific Service.

tools.name: services.deleteSession
tools.description: Delete a specific Session.

tools.name: services.deleteShortCode
tools.description: Delete a specific Short Code from a Service.

tools.name: services.fetchInteraction
tools.description: Retrieve a list of Interactions for a given [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session).

tools.name: services.fetchParticipant
tools.description: Fetch a specific Participant.

tools.name: services.fetchPhoneNumber
tools.description: Fetch a specific Phone Number.

tools.name: services.fetchService
tools.description: Fetch a specific Service.

tools.name: services.fetchSession
tools.description: Fetch a specific Session.

tools.name: services.fetchShortCode
tools.description: Fetch a specific Short Code.

tools.name: services.listInteraction
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Interactions for a Session. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.

tools.name: services.listParticipant
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Participants in a Session.

tools.name: services.listPhoneNumber
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Phone Numbers in the Proxy Number Pool for a Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.

tools.name: services.listService
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Services for Twilio Proxy. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.

tools.name: services.listSession
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Sessions for the Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.

tools.name: services.listShortCode
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Short Codes in the Proxy Number Pool for the Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.

tools.name: services.updatePhoneNumber
tools.description: Update a specific Proxy Number.

tools.name: services.updateService
tools.description: Update a specific Service.

tools.name: services.updateSession
tools.description: Update a specific Session.

tools.name: services.updateShortCode
tools.description: Update a specific Short Code.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
